creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #1)
Hello,

I agree, I also thought for a while that the project was completely dead. But from what I can see, even after this version, someone takes care of him all the time, for example upgraded it to use GTK 3. So maybe it's not so bad. ;)

Also agree, let's wait for the opinion of others in this matter.

Have a nice weekend :)
Bartek
